name: Snickers Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 quart nonfat frozen vanilla yogurt, sugar free, softened
1 package chocolate pudding mix, sugar free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened yogurt with the pudding mix and peanut butter.
2. Fold in the whipped topping.
3. Pour the mixture into a sprayed pie plate.
4. Freeze until set.
